source_description: Bundles 5 backlog items into a single cohesive economy/itemization foundation: D2-light affix system (4 tiers, single affix pool, hybrid item-level), Gold currency (coexists with Eisenbrocken), Health Potions (4 tiers, F-key, HoT), Mara as Shop & Reroll Vendor, Enchanted (Champion/Unique) enemies. Replaces existing item rarity/affix system entirely.
